name: Gazpacho (Salad Soup)
recipeIngredient: 3 cups vegetable stock, condensed,  see note
recipeInstructions:
Use low-sodium chicken stock or broth if vegetable stock is not available.
For herbs, use your choice of chives, parsley, basil, or tarragon. All ingredients should be as fresh as possible.
1. Crush garlic in a bowl and add bread that has been torn into small pieces. This helps give the soup its consistency. Add sliced cucumber, diced green pepper, water, and olive oil. Allow this mixture to marinate for several hours.
2. Add cut-up tomatoes, onions, pimientos, and salt to chilled mixture. Blend in a blender or food processor until the desired texture is achieved. Chill thoroughly.
3. Just before serving, mix in vinegar, cold stock, and herbs. For added color, flavor, and texture, garnish with garlic croutons, watercress, or lime slices.
